summary: Tested new AthleteHero card action buttons feature. All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI flows verified: Send Message, Log Check-In, Escalate, Resolve buttons all working correctly with appropriate toasts and form behaviors.
critical_code_review_comments: AthleteHero card correctly shows different CTAs based on issue type: 'Send Message' for general issues, 'Log Check-In' for momentum_drop
Escalate button correctly shows only for critical severity issues
Resolve button correctly shows only when issue has an id
Message form appears inline with correct placeholder text for check-in vs regular message
All action buttons trigger appropriate API calls and show success toasts
Issue lifecycle working correctly - resolved issues show 'Instance #N' badge if problem persists
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hero card action buttons feature fully tested and working. Athletes with issues show hero card with appropriate action buttons. athlete_2 (Olivia Anderson) shows Send Message + Escalate + Resolve for critical blocker. athlete_3 (Marcus Johnson) shows Log Check-In + Escalate + Resolve for momentum_drop. athlete_5 (Lucas Rodriguez) shows hero card for upcoming event alert (high priority signal). All toasts working: 'Message sent', 'Issue escalated — notification sent', 'Issue resolved'.

frontend_ui: athlete_2 hero card visible with CRITICAL badge - PASS
athlete_2 shows 'Send Message' CTA (correct for missing_blocker type) - PASS
athlete_2 shows 'Escalate' button (correct for critical severity) - PASS
athlete_2 message form opens with textarea, Send & Cancel buttons - PASS
athlete_3 hero card shows 'Log Check-In' CTA (correct for momentum_drop) - PASS
athlete_3 message form has correct placeholder for check-in - PASS
athlete_5 shows hero card for event alert (high priority signal) - PASS
Send Message flow: click CTA -> form -> fill -> Send -> toast 'Message sent' - PASS
Escalate flow: click Escalate -> toast 'Issue escalated — notification sent' - PASS
Resolve flow: click Resolve -> toast 'Issue resolved' + card refreshes with Instance #2 - PASS

verified_requirements.athlete_2_hero_card_buttons: PASS - Shows Send Message, Escalate, Resolve
verified_requirements.athlete_3_hero_card_buttons: PASS - Shows Log Check-In, Escalate, Resolve
verified_requirements.athlete_5_hero_card: PASS - Shows hero card for event alert (has high priority recruiting signal)
verified_requirements.send_message_cta_flow: PASS - Inline form appears, message sent with toast
verified_requirements.resolve_button_flow: PASS - Issue resolved with toast, card refreshes
verified_requirements.escalate_button_flow: PASS - Escalation message sent with toast
